ValidationRule.description: The Status cannot be changed in this Record Type.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.Name = 'Customer Care - Complaint Closed' ,NOT( ISPICKVAL(Status, ('Complaint PKI Closed'))) ,OR( NOT( ISPICKVAL(Status, ('Sent to QMS')))) ,OR( NOT( ISPICKVAL(Status, ('Cancelled')))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_023: The Status cannot be changed in this Record Type. Please contact your System Admin to make any changes
